action.reasoning: First iteration: building a complete pipeline with a lightweight ResNet-style U-Net for global weather forecasting. Starting with 5 epochs to validate end-to-end training, prediction, and evaluation timing. Using latitude-weighted MSE loss and per-channel normalization. Will test predict.py locally before submitting eval.
action.command: python train.py --epochs 5 --batch_size 64 && mkdir -p /tmp/test_pred && cp /data/norm_stats.json /tmp/test_pred/ && python -c "import numpy as np; np.save('/tmp/test_pred/test_inputs.npy', np.zeros((10,3,2,32,64), dtype=np.float32))" && python predict.py --data_path /tmp/test_pred --checkpoint checkpoints/best.pt --output /tmp/test_pred/out.json && cat /tmp/test_pred/out.json
